blocks.code:
(define channels (get (rb-state "channels.json") "channels"))
(define slugs (keys channels))
(define (post-count slug)
  (list slug (or (get (get channels slug) "post_count") 0)))
(define counts (map post-count slugs))
(define sorted (sort counts (lambda (a b) (> (nth a 1) (nth b 1)))))
(take sorted 5)
